title: stelis aglochis
intro: Stelis aglochis, also known as the "Coral Root," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Stelis aglochis are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat digestive issues, as well as to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
